title: Luffy Runs Out of Time — Part 4
description: Luffy’s Gear Fourth backlash leaves him vulnerable while the Birdcage keeps closing.
scene: On pages 17–29, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Utter domination! A decisive, fatal blow!

summary: This part focuses on luffy runs out of time, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
